name: part_005
file: tmp_【#冥ハロ2025】白上フブキ生誕３DLIVE「冥界Halloween Night!」【白上フブキ⧸ホロライブ】 [7Tm7dVsTPBk]_gemini-3-flash-preview/part_005.webm

scenes.description: Fubuki and Aqua performing a energetic song in a detective-themed study room.
Fubuki performs a dramatic monologue as the lights dim and text appears on screen.
A dialogue scene between Aqua as the assistant and Fubuki as the detective.
The song performance continues with rapid dancing and synchronized vocals.
A transition scene featuring a sentimental narration over an illustration of child Fubuki and Mio.
Fubuki and Mio perform a gentle, emotional duet in a magical castle courtyard.
Final narration over an illustration transition.

subtitles.original: Everybody
subtitles.english: Everybody

subtitles.original: アリバイ
subtitles.english: Alibi

subtitles.original: ない、ない、ない
subtitles.english: None, none, none

subtitles.original: 怪盗レムの罠にはまり、次々と姿を消していく名探偵たち。
subtitles.english: Falling into Phantom Thief Rem's trap, the famous detectives disappear one after another.

subtitles.original: そして探偵のいぬ間に、人々の心は密室となった。
subtitles.english: And while the detectives were away, people's hearts became locked rooms.

subtitles.original: でも、それならどうして私だけが無事だったんでしょうか？
subtitles.english: But if so, why was I the only one safe?

subtitles.original: その答えはひとつしか考えられない。
subtitles.english: There can only be one answer to that.

subtitles.original: と、いうと……？
subtitles.english: Which is...?

subtitles.original: あまりに無能すぎるがゆえに、君は探偵として勘定にも入れられていなかったのだ！
subtitles.english: Because you're so incompetent, you weren't even counted as a detective!

subtitles.original: ひどーい！
subtitles.english: That's mean!

subtitles.original: およしになって　おやめになって　怪奇事件
subtitles.english: Please stop, please quit this mysterious incident

subtitles.original: おさげ揺らす探偵さん
subtitles.english: The detective with swinging braids

subtitles.original: Knock's Baby, God's Done Baby, いかないで
subtitles.english: Knock's Baby, God's Done Baby, don't go

subtitles.original: And more　先生のいじわるイケズ
subtitles.english: And more, Professor's mean trick

subtitles.original: レトロなトリック　ハットトリック　難事件
subtitles.english: Retro trick, hat trick, difficult case

subtitles.original: 推理作家の先生
subtitles.english: Professor, the mystery writer

subtitles.original: うだらぱだら　うだらぱだら　言わないで
subtitles.english: Don't say "udara-padara udara-padara"

subtitles.original: あぁもう　頭がこんがらがってきたけど
subtitles.english: Ah, my head is getting all tangled up

subtitles.original: 可愛い可愛いや　トリック甘いね　通りゃんせ
subtitles.english: Cute, so cute, your tricks are naive, please pass through

subtitles.original: 小さい二人の子供が約束した。
subtitles.english: Two small children made a promise.

subtitles.original: ずっといっしょに笑っていようの約束。
subtitles.english: A promise to keep laughing together forever.

subtitles.original: 今もなお、二人の絆は確かなもので、
subtitles.english: Even now, the bond between them is certain,

subtitles.original: 友情と愛情が織りなす素敵な物語。
subtitles.english: A wonderful story woven from friendship and love.

subtitles.original: あははっ……なんでもないことに、妙にツボっちゃう時あるよねっ。
subtitles.english: Ahaha... There are times when you just get a weird fit of giggles over nothing, right?

subtitles.original: あー恋に落ちたまゆら
subtitles.english: Ah, a fleeting moment of falling in love

subtitles.original: 開花止まらないや
subtitles.english: The blooming doesn't stop

subtitles.original: 何度も捲って
subtitles.english: Turning the pages over and over

subtitles.original: 心をかし
subtitles.english: Lending my heart

subtitles.original: 泣いてばっかだったの　それがどうだい今や
subtitles.english: I used to do nothing but cry, but look at me now

subtitles.original: 腹捩れるくらい笑う
subtitles.english: I laugh until my sides ache

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑う
subtitles.english: We'll laugh together forever

subtitles.original: きみが持ってる白い花に
subtitles.english: Against the white flower you hold

subtitles.original: あたし見合わないかな　悲しくなる
subtitles.english: I might not be worthy, it makes me sad

subtitles.original: 無垢な恋とか正しさとか
subtitles.english: Innocent love and righteousness

subtitles.original: 誰も教えてくれなかった
subtitles.english: No one ever taught me about them

subtitles.original: 昨日会ったばっかで
subtitles.english: We only met yesterday

subtitles.original: 今日もどっか会えたら　なんて思う暮らし
subtitles.english: Hoping to meet somewhere again today

subtitles.original: 慎ましくないよね　全部許されたの
subtitles.english: It's not very modest, is it? Everything was forgiven

subtitles.original: びっくりしちゃってさ　涙あふれてたよ
subtitles.english: I was so surprised, tears started overflowing

subtitles.original: もう愛になる鼻歌
subtitles.english: A hum that's turning into love

subtitles.original: 透き通った空に　手を繋いでいった　夢のしるし
subtitles.english: Under the clear sky, holding hands, a sign of a dream

subtitles.original: どんな前世だってさ　忘れたっていいんだ
subtitles.english: Whatever our past lives were, it's okay to forget

subtitles.original: きみと笑えるなら
subtitles.english: As long as I can laugh with you

subtitles.original: 心が触れるたび　綺麗な音鳴る
subtitles.english: Every time our hearts touch, a beautiful sound rings out

subtitles.original: 目と目が合ってくすぐったいね
subtitles.english: When our eyes meet, it feels so ticklish

subtitles.original: なんでもないこと　妙にツボるね
subtitles.english: The simplest things make us burst into giggles

subtitles.original: 全部教えてくれて　ありがとう
subtitles.english: Thank you for teaching me everything

subtitles.original: きみが持ってる白い花を
subtitles.english: The white flower you hold

subtitles.original: あたしの紅色と合わせたら
subtitles.english: If I combine it with my crimson color

subtitles.original: 霜が解けては雲が行く
subtitles.english: The frost thaws and the clouds pass by

subtitles.original: もう寒くないよ
subtitles.english: It's not cold anymore

subtitles.original: あー恋に落ちたまゆら
subtitles.english: Ah, a fleeting moment of falling in love

subtitles.original: 開花止まらないや
subtitles.english: The blooming doesn't stop

subtitles.original: 何度も捲って　心をかし
subtitles.english: Turning the pages over and over, lending my heart

subtitles.original: 泣いてばっかだったの　それがどうだい今や
subtitles.english: I used to do nothing but cry, but look at me now

subtitles.original: 腹捩れるくらい笑う
subtitles.english: I laugh until my sides ache

subtitles.original: ずっと一緒に笑って
subtitles.english: Keep laughing together forever

subtitles.original: （恋に落ちたまゆら）
subtitles.english: (A fleeting moment of falling in love)

subtitles.original: （心をかし）
subtitles.english: (Lending my heart)

subtitles.original: （愛になる鼻歌）
subtitles.english: (A hum that's turning into love)

subtitles.original: （ずっと一緒に笑う）
subtitles.english: (Laughing together forever)

subtitles.original: 最後の日を笑う
subtitles.english: Laugh on the final day

subtitles.original: これは、遠い遠い名も知らぬ世界で、
subtitles.english: This is, in a far, far unknown world...
